name: Young plasma infusion
summary: Young plasma infusion is normalized for the PLASMA Alzheimer disease safety and feasibility pilot.
mechanism_summary: Infuses plasma from young donors to alter circulating-factor exposure, with linked evidence bounded to feasibility and limited disease-specific efficacy signals.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: PLASMA young plasma Alzheimer disease trial; Young plasma AD pilot was feasible with limited efficacy signal.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
